title: Eddy Daniels
compiled_truth: Eddy Daniels is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-12-12 to 2002-02-12), Eddy Daniels sent 13 and received 203 emails, totalling 216 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Novak](people/john-novak) (7), [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (5), [E  Haedicke](people/e-haedicke) (3), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (3), [Lance Schuler-Legal](people/lance-schuler-legal) (2).
